track-A.description: Track A: Measurement and baseline — civil-time error, county deviation atlas, DST shift analysis

track-B.description: Track B: Source and temporal data model — boundary sources, time-versioned regimes, global time-rule data

track-C.description: Track C: Optimization and scenario families — candidate search, minimum-change plans, state/county tradeoffs

track-D.description: Track D: Law and DOT convenience — authority, commerce criteria, disruption metrics, reform pathways

track-E.description: Track E: Global and historical systems — comparative country pilots, historical regimes, worldwide source limits
